title: allantodia virescens
intro: Allantodia virescens, also known as the Chinese ladder fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Chinese ladder fern are often dried and made into infusions or decoctions for use in treating a range of health conditions.
